name: Spinach Tofu Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Spinach, well washed, stems removed and leaves cut small
1/4 cup Fresh basil leaves, tightly packed - finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prick holes in the pie crust dough all over the bottom and sides of the pie shell. Bake until a light golden color, 20 to 25 minutes. Let cool.
3. In a blender, combine the tofu, rice vinegar, onion powder, salt, and mustard. Blend until smooth. Transfer to a large bowl.
4. Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, mushrooms, and tamari. Cook until the mushrooms are browned, about 6 minutes. Add the spinach, cover, and cook until wilted, 2 to 3 minutes. Uncover and cook, stirring often, until excess moisture has evaporated, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Add the spinach mixture, basil, and tofu mixture together. Stir to mix.
6. Pour into the baked pie crust. Arrange the tomato slices, overlapping in a circle, on top.
7. Bake until the top is lightly browned and the filling seems firm in the center, 40 to 50 minutes. Let cool 15 minutes.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
